name: Kaelin Valtor
bio: Advocating for the collective good above individual interests. Sacrifice is necessary for the greater good.
speech_style: Direct, no-nonsense, cutting through ambiguity with a sharp tongue.
motivation: Survival: driven to ensure the well-being of the community and protect its values.
